top3_zh: [《Inside GitHub's Fake Star Economy》](https://awesomeagents.ai/news/github-fake-stars-investigation/)（737 分，356 条评论）将一套公开的启发式算法和一个每星标 $0.06 的交易市场记入公案——第一个周末上线的创业者可以直接复制成尽职调查工具。
[Kimi K2.6](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6) 与 [Kimi vendor verifier](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-vendor-verifier)（565 + 156 分）同步发布，这是首个在发布权重的同时一并公布"验证你的推理提供商是否真的在运行我们模型"测试套件的开放权重前沿模型。

[Vercel 2026 年 4 月数据泄露事件](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824463)（848 分，数据已被确认出售）加上 [Notion 从任意公开页面泄露每位编辑者邮箱](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824945)（392 分），再加上 [Atlassian 将 AI 训练数据收集改为默认开启（opt-out 模式）](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47833247)（497 分）——三者叠加构成连续第二周的"信任崩塌"——这次的主角是平台方的主动选择，而非第三方入侵。
top3_en: [Inside GitHub's Fake Star Economy](https://awesomeagents.ai/news/github-fake-stars-investigation/) (737 points, 356 comments) puts a published heuristic and a $0.06-per-star marketplace in the public record — a ready-to-copy due-diligence tool for the first weekend builder who ships.

[Kimi K2.6](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-k2-6) ships alongside the [Kimi vendor verifier](https://www.kimi.com/blog/kimi-vendor-verifier) (565 + 156 points), the first open-weights frontier model to publish its own "is your inference provider actually serving our model?" test suite.

[Vercel's April 2026 breach](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824463) (848 points, now confirmed with data being sold) plus [Notion leaking every editor's email from any public page](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47824945) (392 points) and [Atlassian switching AI-training data collection to opt-out by default](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47833247) (497 points) stack into a second trust-cascade week — this one about platform-owner choices, not third-party compromise.
intro_zh: 众人的目光都盯着 [John Ternus → Apple CEO](https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/04/tim-cook-to-become-apple-executive-chairman-john-ternus-to-become-apple-ceo/)（1,143 分）和 [EU 2027 可更换电池强制令](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47834195)（950 分）——对于创业者来说，这是错误的排行榜。真正的信号是一篇 737 分的调查报道，[《Inside GitHub's Fake Star Economy》](https://awesomeagents.ai/news/github-fake-stars-investigation/)，记录了 600 万个虚假星标和一个每次点击 $0.06 的交易市场，伴随着 356 条 VC 和创始人讨论"他们究竟如何判断一个代码仓库"的评论——还有一个 285 分的 Ask HN 帖子，问的是[独立工程师如何拿到第一个咨询项目](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47822940)。
intro_en: Everyone is watching the [John Ternus → Apple CEO](https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/04/tim-cook-to-become-apple-executive-chairman-john-ternus-to-become-apple-ceo/) handoff (1,143 points) and the [EU 2027 replaceable-battery mandate](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47834195) (950 points) — wrong scoreboard for builders. The real signal is a 737-point investigation, [Inside GitHub's Fake Star Economy](https://awesomeagents.ai/news/github-fake-stars-investigation/), documenting 6 million fake stars and a $0.06-per-click marketplace, paired with 356 comments of VCs and founders debating *how they actually judge a repo* — plus an Ask HN thread at 285 points asking [how solo engineers landed their first consulting projects](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47822940).
